# YFQ-44A Flies with Mission Autonomy Software from Anduril & Shield AI

Anduril’s YFQ-44A Collaborative Combat Aircraft achieves a new milestone, successfully flying with both Anduril’s Lattice and Shield AI’s Hivemind mission autonomy software on a single sortie.
